# Quick Reference

This chapter provides a quick reference card for common administrative tasks and essential information.

## Contact Information

::: {.callout-tip}
## IT Service Center
| | |
|---|---|
| **Email** | it-support@tum.de |
| **Phone** | +49.89.289.17123 |
| **Website** | [www.it.tum.de](https://www.it.tum.de) |
| **Address** | Arcisstr. 21, 80333 München |
:::

## Essential URLs

| Resource | URL |
|----------|-----|
| **TUM IT for Admins** | [www.it.tum.de/it/admins/](https://www.it.tum.de/it/admins/) |
| **TUMonline** | [campus.tum.de](https://campus.tum.de) |
| **LRZ Documentation** | [doku.lrz.de](https://doku.lrz.de) |
| **TUM Wiki** | [wiki.tum.de](https://wiki.tum.de) |

## Service Request Matrix

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-cap: "Service Request Decision Tree"
flowchart TB
    Task["What do you need?"]

    Task --> User["User/Group<br/>Management"]
    Task --> Network["Network<br/>Services"]
    Task --> Infra["Infrastructure"]
    Task --> Storage["Storage"]
    Task --> Other["Other"]

    User --> TUMonline1["TUMonline<br/>(Self-service)"]
    Network --> |DNS/Firewall| ITSZ1["IT Service Center<br/>/ LRZ"]
    Network --> |VPN| LRZ1["LRZ<br/>(Self-service)"]
    Infra --> |Virtual Server| LRZ2["LRZ"]
    Infra --> |Hardware Hosting| LRZ3["LRZ"]
    Storage --> |NAS Setup| ITSZ2["IT Service Center"]
    Storage --> |Restore Data| ITSZ3["IT Service Center"]
    Other --> ITSZ4["IT Service Center"]
```

## Quick Task Reference

### User Management (TUMonline)

| Task | Where | Steps |
|------|-------|-------|
| **Manage User** | TUMonline → User Admin | Navigate to user, modify |
| **Create Group** | TUMonline → Groups | Define name, members |
| **Create Mailing List** | TUMonline → Groups | Create group, enable mail |
| **Create Shared Mailbox** | TUMonline → Function Objects | Create function object |

### Network Services

| Task | Method | Contact |
|------|--------|---------|
| **DNS Entry** | IT Service Center | it-support@tum.de |
| **Domain Setup** | IT Service Center | it-support@tum.de |
| **VPN Access** | LRZ Self-Service | Via LRZ portal |
| **Firewall** | LRZ | Via LRZ |

### Infrastructure

| Task | Method | Contact |
|------|--------|---------|
| **Virtual Server** | LRZ | Via LRZ portal |
| **Server Housing** | LRZ | Via LRZ |
| **Compute Cloud** | LRZ | Via LRZ portal |
| **TUM-PC Setup** | IT Service Center | it-support@tum.de |

### Storage & Backup

| Task | Method | Contact |
|------|--------|---------|
| **Project Storage** | IT Service Center | it-support@tum.de |
| **Data Restore** | IT Service Center | it-support@tum.de |
| **Quota Increase** | IT Service Center | it-support@tum.de |

## Common Procedures

### Managing Users via TUMonline

```
1. Login to TUMonline (campus.tum.de)
2. Navigate to your admin area
3. Select user management
4. Make required changes:
   - Group assignments
   - Access permissions
   - Function objects
5. Save changes
6. Changes sync to LDAP/AD automatically
```

### Registering a New Device

```
1. Collect device information:
   - MAC address
   - Device type
   - Intended hostname
2. Contact IT Service Center or use
   network registration tools
3. Provide device details
4. Device receives network configuration
5. Document in department inventory
```

### Requesting Data Restoration

```
1. Email: it-support@tum.de
2. Subject: Data Restoration Request
3. Include:
   - Full path to data
   - Date to restore from
   - Brief description
4. Wait for confirmation
```

## Standard Specifications

### LRZ Virtual Servers

| Aspect | Options |
|--------|---------|
| **OS** | SLES, Debian, Windows Server |
| **Management** | Self-managed or LRZ-managed |
| **Availability** | High-availability infrastructure |
| **Backup** | Included |

### LRZ Online Storage (NAS)

| Specification | Value |
|--------------|-------|
| **Personal Storage** | Automatic for TUM members |
| **Project Storage** | On request |
| **Protocols** | NFS, SMB |
| **Backup** | Automatic via LRZ |
| **Access** | MWN network + VPN |

## Troubleshooting Quick Guide

### Device Not Getting IP

1. Check device network registration
2. Verify physical connection
3. Try `ipconfig /release` then `/renew` (Windows)
4. Check cable/WiFi connection
5. Contact IT Service Center if issue persists

### Cannot Access NAS

1. Verify VPN connection (if remote)
2. Check user is in correct group (TUMonline)
3. Verify correct path/share name
4. Try re-authenticating
5. Contact IT Service Center if issue persists

### Server Not Accessible

1. Check server status via LRZ portal
2. Verify DNS entry exists
3. Check network connectivity
4. Try restart if authorized
5. Contact IT Service Center / LRZ if issue persists

## Checklists

### New Administrator Checklist

- [ ] Contact IT Service Center for orientation
- [ ] Obtain TUMonline admin access
- [ ] Review TUM Wiki and LRZ documentation
- [ ] Meet with predecessor (if applicable)
- [ ] Verify contact info with IT Service Center
- [ ] Review department infrastructure inventory
- [ ] Understand current user base

### User Offboarding Checklist

- [ ] Update user account in TUMonline
- [ ] Remove from all groups
- [ ] Revoke VPN access
- [ ] Transfer data ownership
- [ ] Update documentation

### New Device Deployment Checklist

- [ ] Collect MAC address
- [ ] Determine hostname
- [ ] Register with network administration
- [ ] Verify network access working
- [ ] Configure device
- [ ] Document in inventory

## Glossary

| Term | Definition |
|------|------------|
| **AD** | Active Directory |
| **DFN** | German Research Network (Deutsches Forschungsnetz) |
| **DHCP** | Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol |
| **DNS** | Domain Name System |
| **ITSZ** | IT Service Center (IT-Servicezentrum) |
| **LDAP** | Lightweight Directory Access Protocol |
| **LRZ** | Leibniz Supercomputing Centre |
| **MWN** | Munich Scientific Network (Münchner Wissenschaftsnetz) |
| **NAS** | Network Attached Storage |
| **NFS** | Network File System |
| **SMB** | Server Message Block (Windows file sharing) |
| **TUM** | Technical University of Munich |
| **TUMonline** | TUM's central campus management system |
| **VM** | Virtual Machine |
| **VPN** | Virtual Private Network |
| **WSUS** | Windows Server Update Services |
